summary: First-time E2E review of Pluto MVP. Backend: 18/18 pytest cases passed for topics, posts (CRUD + filtering + spam 429), music (upload/list/featured/reactions toggle/switch + counts), reports (dedup + 3-strike hide), and moderation (auth gate + reported list + delete + safe). Frontend: Landing, Feed, Music, and Mod-station all load on mobile viewport, key CTAs and data-testids present, create-post flow works end-to-end, music hug counter increments correctly (1→2), mod-key auth gate authorizes with 'pluto-mod-2026'.

minor.issue: CORS_ORIGINS and MOD_KEY are concatenated on the same line ('CORS_ORIGINS="*"MOD_KEY="pluto-mod-2026"') without a newline. Currently harmless because MOD_KEY has a hardcoded fallback default of 'pluto-mod-2026' in server.py and CORS still parses '*'. However, if anyone changes the MOD_KEY in .env they should fix the formatting first.

action_items: (Optional) Fix backend/.env formatting: insert newline between CORS_ORIGINS and MOD_KEY. Not blocking — MOD_KEY default fallback covers it.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is monolithic (~360 lines) — fine for MVP but consider splitting into routers (posts, music, reports, mod) if the app grows.
cleanup_expired() runs on every GET /posts and /trending — for low traffic OK, but a TTL index on expires_at would be more efficient (Mongo supports expireAfterSeconds on a date field).
MOD_KEY is sent via custom header X-Mod-Key — fine, but client stores raw key in localStorage; acceptable for hidden mod page but document this in README.

Music endpoint allows arbitrary base64 audio — server doesn't enforce a max size; for MongoDB document 16MB cap, consider explicit size validation to return a friendly 413 instead of MongoDB write errors.
All Pydantic validation, async/await usage, _id stripping, env var usage, and HTTP status codes are correct.
test_credentials: Mod key: pluto-mod-2026 (header X-Mod-Key for API, password input for /mod-station). No user accounts — anonymous device_id in localStorage 'pluto.device_id'.
seed_data_creation: Tests create disposable TEST_-prefixed posts and music tracks via API. Some remain in DB until 24h auto-expiry. Two music tracks (TEST_T2, TEST_Track) currently visible in /music feed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_pluto_api.py cover all 18 critical scenarios from the review request (topics x1, posts x5 incl. 11-post 429, music x6 incl. hug/fug toggle/switch + my-reaction, reports x2 incl. 3-strike hide, moderation x4 incl. unauthorized + safe + delete for both target types). Run with: `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_pluto_api.py -v`. Frontend Playwright flow validated: landing CTAs → CreatePostModal submit → Feed with topic filters (12 crypto posts visible after seeding) → Music page hug toggle → /mod-station auth gate with key 'pluto-mod-2026' → moderation page. No JS console errors observed. Bottom nav rendered on 390x844 viewport.
rca of the issue: No bugs found requiring RCA. All requested features are wired and working end-to-end.
